versions.content:
v0.4.1 修复了多个影响日常使用的重要问题，特别是设备被无故踢下线的 bug，以及移动端冷启动后隧道身份丢失的问题。同时改进了在线客服的智能对话体验，并优化了多个平台的稳定性。

## New Features
- **智能客服增强**: AI 客服新增交互式欢迎按钮、视频/语音通话请求自动转人工、账户相关问题自动转人工
- **官网帮助中心**: 全新设计的帮助页面，包含视频教程、常见问题、SEO 优化
- **Linux tar.gz 更新器**: Linux 从 AppImage 切换到 tar.gz 打包，更新包体积从 85MB 降至 ~8MB
- **三方错误分类**: 引擎错误区分客户端/网络/服务端/目标站点四类，target 类错误不影响 VPN 状态
- **诊断日志系统**: 新增结构化诊断日志，支持心跳、DNS、传输层、代理拨号等多维度快速定位

## Bug Fixes
- **修复设备无故被踢下线**: 两台不同 Mac 可能生成相同的硬件标识符，导致设备在不同账号间反复转移。现已改用随机标识符 + 本地持久化，彻底消除碰撞问题
- **修复移动端冷启动后隧道身份丢失**: iOS/Android 冷启动后未能恢复隧道身份，导致连接失败
- **修复登录后旧 401 响应清除新 token**: 竞态条件下旧请求的 401 响应可能清除刚登录获取的新 token
- **修复更新通知遮挡移动端安全区域**: UpdateNotification 横幅未适配 iOS 刘海屏安全区域
- **修复 Windows 退出时双重断开崩溃**: Windows 退出时 stop_vpn 被调用两次导致崩溃
- **修复 Android 亮色模式状态栏**: Android 设备系统亮色模式下状态栏显示为白色
- **修复 iOS NE 进程被杀后自动重连**: iOS 系统终止 Network Extension 后现在能自动恢复连接
- **修复 Linux FUSE 限制下的 k2 二进制暂存路径**: pkexec 无法访问 FUSE 挂载点

## Improvements
- **抗封锁能力**: antiblock Happy Eyeballs 策略，6 个 CDN 镜像并发探测，避免中国区 10 秒超时
- **iOS 内存优化**: Network Extension 内存诊断和 DNS 并发控制
- **构建流程优化**: macOS/Windows 签名和发布流程改进，S3 上传与构建分离防止误发布

## Breaking Changes
- **首次升级需要重新登录**: 设备标识符生成方式变更，首次打开新版本后需要重新登录一次。此后不再需要

versions.content:
v0.4.0 是一次重大版本升级。全新自研拥塞控制协议 **k2cc** 正式上线——针对高丢包、高延迟的受干扰网络深度优化，即使在严重干扰环境下也能保持接近无损的传输速度。同时带来 iOS/Android 移动端支持、Linux 桌面端、全新官网、以及大量稳定性改进。

## New Features
- **k2cc 拥塞控制协议**: 自研拥塞控制算法，在高丢包、高延迟的严重干扰环境下保持接近无损的传输速度
- **iOS 和 Android 移动端**: 全新移动端客户端，支持 iOS Network Extension 和 Android VPN Service
- **Linux 桌面端**: 新增 Linux 平台支持（tar.gz 打包），一行命令安装
- **实时状态推送**: 连接状态从定时查询升级为 SSE 实时推送，操作响应更即时
- **Beta 测试通道**: 新增 beta 更新通道，提前体验新功能。Beta 模式自动收集诊断日志
- **Android USB 安装助手**: ADB 一键安装，支持自动设备检测和品牌适配指引
- **反馈系统**: 应用内反馈按钮 + 日志自动上传 + 工单追踪
- **k2 CLI**: 命令行工具支持 `k2 up/down/status`，可通过 PATH 直接调用
- **在线客服**: 官网集成 AI 客服 + 人工转接
- **官网全面重构**: 全新首页动效、下载页双 CDN、K2 协议文档、帮助中心

## Bug Fixes
- 修复弱网环境下连接异常断开后未能及时重连的问题
- 修复 QUIC stream slot 泄漏导致连接数耗尽的问题
- 修复 macOS DNS 崩溃后无法恢复的问题
- 修复 Windows 退出时双重断开崩溃
- 修复 iOS Network Extension 进程被杀后未能自动重连
- 修复 iOS 内存压力下 NE 被系统终止的问题
- 修复 Android 亮色模式状态栏显示异常
- 修复页面偶尔空白的显示问题
- 修复视口缩放时布局异常
- 修复 Windows 升级期间短暂断网
- 修复登录后旧 401 响应清除新 token 的竞态问题
- 修复 VPN 连接/断开按钮的双击竞态

## Improvements
- **连接稳定性**: DNS 容错增强 + 网络变化感知（netCoordinator）+ 自动重连探测
- **抗封锁能力**: 协议伪装增强 + antiblock Happy Eyeballs 多 CDN 并发探测
- **统一日志系统**: 全平台统一日志格式、轮转策略（20MB/3 备份/7 天）、stderr 重定向
- **错误分类**: 三方错误分类（客户端/网络/服务端/目标站点），错误提示更清晰
- **macOS 安装包瘦身**: universal binary，体积减少约 35%
- **Windows 签名**: macOS 交叉编译 + Authenticode 签名
- **iOS App Store 合规**: 隐私清单、账户删除、购买引导
- **路由规则升级**: 规则引擎 v0.6.1，智能分流更精准
- **内存优化**: iOS NE 内存诊断 + Go 内存限制 + smux 缓冲区协商

## Breaking Changes
- **k2arc 更名为 k2cc**: 拥塞控制协议品牌名统一为 k2cc（避免与业余无线电术语冲突）

newFeatures: **k2cc 拥塞控制协议**: 自研拥塞控制算法，在高丢包、高延迟的严重干扰环境下保持接近无损的传输速度
**iOS 和 Android 移动端**: 全新移动端客户端，支持 iOS Network Extension 和 Android VPN Service
**Linux 桌面端**: 新增 Linux 平台支持（tar.gz 打包），一行命令安装

**官网全面重构**: 全新首页动效、下载页双 CDN、K2 协议文档、帮助中心

**抗封锁能力**: 协议伪装增强 + antiblock Happy Eyeballs 多 CDN 并发探测

versions.content:
v0.4.0 是一次重大版本升级。全新自研拥塞控制协议 **K2ARC** 正式上线——针对高丢包、高延迟的受干扰网络深度优化，即使在严重干扰环境下也能保持接近无损的传输速度，流媒体、视频会议、大文件下载均不受影响。同时带来更快的状态响应、更好的连接稳定性、全新的网站体验，以及大量细节优化。

## New Features
- **K2ARC 拥塞控制协议**: 自研拥塞控制算法，在高丢包、高延迟的严重干扰环境下保持接近无损的传输速度
- **实时状态推送**: 连接状态从定时查询升级为实时推送，操作响应更即时，断线感知更迅速
- **Beta 测试通道**: 新增 beta 更新通道，提前体验新功能。Beta 模式自动收集诊断日志，帮助我们更快定位问题
- **开发者模式**: 高级用户可在运行时切换日志级别，便于自助排查
- **K2 协议文档**: 官网新增 [K2 协议技术文档](/k2/)专区，中英文对照
- **家长指引页**: 新增[家长指引](/guide/parents)页面，方便学校推荐的家长了解产品
- **反馈按钮**: 应用内新增可拖拽的反馈悬浮按钮，随时提交使用反馈
- **在线客服**: 官网集成在线客服，获取帮助更便捷

## Bug Fixes
- 修复弱网环境下连接异常断开后未能及时重连的问题
- 修复 macOS 12.5 及更早版本上输入框无法点击聚焦的问题
- 修复页面偶尔空白的显示问题
- 修复视口缩放时布局异常
- 修复特定情况下反复弹出更新提示的问题
- 修复错误状态下 VPN 按钮行为不合理的问题
- 修复 Windows 升级期间短暂断网的问题

## Improvements
- **连接稳定性**: DNS 容错增强，减少因 DNS 问题导致的连接失败
- **路由规则升级**: 规则引擎更新至 v0.6.1，智能分流更精准
- **错误提示优化**: 连接错误展示更清晰，不再出现难以理解的技术信息
- **抗干扰增强**: 提升协议伪装能力，改善受干扰网络环境下的可用性
- **内存占用降低**: 优化连接层内存使用
- **窗口行为优化**: 关闭窗口改为最小化到托盘，支持开机最小化启动
- **macOS 安装包瘦身**: 安装包体积减少约 35%
- **升级更平滑**: macOS 和 Windows 升级过程优化
- **官网首页**: 全新品牌标语，导航重新设计，页面加载更快
- **邀请页面**: 简化页面布局，视觉更整洁
- **日志系统**: 全新结构化日志架构，排障信息更完整

newFeatures: **K2ARC 拥塞控制协议**: 自研拥塞控制算法，在高丢包、高延迟的严重干扰环境下保持接近无损的传输速度
**实时状态推送**: 连接状态从定时查询升级为实时推送，操作响应更即时，断线感知更迅速
**Beta 测试通道**: 新增 beta 更新通道，提前体验新功能。Beta 模式自动收集诊断日志，帮助我们更快定位问题
**开发者模式**: 高级用户可在运行时切换日志级别，便于自助排查
**K2 协议文档**: 官网新增 [K2 协议技术文档](/k2/)专区，中英文对照
**家长指引页**: 新增[家长指引](/guide/parents)页面，方便学校推荐的家长了解产品
**反馈按钮**: 应用内新增可拖拽的反馈悬浮按钮，随时提交使用反馈
**在线客服**: 官网集成在线客服，获取帮助更便捷
bugFixes: 修复弱网环境下连接异常断开后未能及时重连的问题
修复 macOS 12.5 及更早版本上输入框无法点击聚焦的问题
修复页面偶尔空白的显示问题
修复视口缩放时布局异常
修复特定情况下反复弹出更新提示的问题
修复错误状态下 VPN 按钮行为不合理的问题
修复 Windows 升级期间短暂断网的问题
improvements: **连接稳定性**: DNS 容错增强，减少因 DNS 问题导致的连接失败
**路由规则升级**: 规则引擎更新至 v0.6.1，智能分流更精准
**错误提示优化**: 连接错误展示更清晰，不再出现难以理解的技术信息
**抗干扰增强**: 提升协议伪装能力，改善受干扰网络环境下的可用性
**内存占用降低**: 优化连接层内存使用
**窗口行为优化**: 关闭窗口改为最小化到托盘，支持开机最小化启动
**macOS 安装包瘦身**: 安装包体积减少约 35%
**升级更平滑**: macOS 和 Windows 升级过程优化
**官网首页**: 全新品牌标语，导航重新设计，页面加载更快
**邀请页面**: 简化页面布局，视觉更整洁
**日志系统**: 全新结构化日志架构，排障信息更完整

versions.content:
## New Features
- **Desktop Release Notes**: Auto-updater displays detailed release notes before installing updates
- **Unified Changelog System**: Single source of truth for version history with web dashboard list view
- **Initialization Status**: Display service initialization progress during startup
- **API Request Logging**: Added request logging for debugging API failures
- Domain search engine with LRU cache for improved rule matching performance
- Binary search lookup and domain index file builder for faster rule processing
- Smux buffer size negotiation for iOS memory optimization
- Memory pressure monitoring and reduced Go memory limit for iOS
- FileLogger for iOS extension debugging with Console.app visibility
- LeakDetector for goroutine baseline tracking with spike detection and stack traces
- Route diagnosis frontend integration

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed Windows update notification not showing before installation begins
- Fixed socket leak from TUN reserved IP traffic (resolved 110K+ file descriptor exhaustion)
- Fixed service not starting after admin_reinstall_service on macOS
- Fixed Go service port restored to 1777
- Fixed desktop update mode skipping finish page run option
- Fixed SmartScreen submission URL display in deployment scripts
- Clear DNS cache when proxy rules change
- Fix rule hot reload bug
- Change dev log path from /var/log/kaitu-service.dev.log to /tmp/kaitu-service.dev.log
- Windows: Skip ghost routes without valid adapter
- Windows: Skip third-party VPN adapters in primary interface selection
- Android: Fix unix/linux build constraints exclusion
- Android: Add missing offset parameter to fdbased.Open
- Mobile: Inject window._k2 for webapp stores compatibility
- Route diagnosis bypasses VPN and uses correct node identifiers
- Prevent raw error messages from being displayed to users

## Improvements
- Removed route diagnosis feature to simplify codebase (~850 lines)
- Enhanced i18n coverage with missing translations across 7 languages
- Improved update UX by removing "Later" option (mandatory updates)
- Unified release notes architecture across platforms
- Added changelog generation to web amplify prebuild
- Vendor tun2socks v2.6.0 as internal package
- iOS TUN buffer pool with blocking read implementation
- Enforce Single Source of Truth for tunnel selection in dashboard
- Refactor to use unique TUN IPs and exact matching for conflict detection
- Remove conflicting TUN IPs from third-party VPNs before setup
- Add golangci-lint configuration and goroutine patterns documentation

## Testing
- Comprehensive test coverage: 200+ new tests across Go backend, React components, and E2E

newFeatures: **Desktop Release Notes**: Auto-updater displays detailed release notes before installing updates
**Unified Changelog System**: Single source of truth for version history with web dashboard list view
**Initialization Status**: Display service initialization progress during startup
**API Request Logging**: Added request logging for debugging API failures
Domain search engine with LRU cache for improved rule matching performance
Binary search lookup and domain index file builder for faster rule processing
Smux buffer size negotiation for iOS memory optimization
Memory pressure monitoring and reduced Go memory limit for iOS
FileLogger for iOS extension debugging with Console.app visibility
LeakDetector for goroutine baseline tracking with spike detection and stack traces
Route diagnosis frontend integration

Fixed socket leak from TUN reserved IP traffic (resolved 110K+ file descriptor exhaustion)
Fixed service not starting after admin_reinstall_service on macOS
Fixed Go service port restored to 1777
Fixed desktop update mode skipping finish page run option
Fixed SmartScreen submission URL display in deployment scripts
Clear DNS cache when proxy rules change
Fix rule hot reload bug
Change dev log path from /var/log/kaitu-service.dev.log to /tmp/kaitu-service.dev.log
Windows: Skip ghost routes without valid adapter
Windows: Skip third-party VPN adapters in primary interface selection
Android: Fix unix/linux build constraints exclusion
Android: Add missing offset parameter to fdbased.Open
Mobile: Inject window._k2 for webapp stores compatibility
Route diagnosis bypasses VPN and uses correct node identifiers
Prevent raw error messages from being displayed to users
improvements: Removed route diagnosis feature to simplify codebase (~850 lines)
Enhanced i18n coverage with missing translations across 7 languages
Improved update UX by removing "Later" option (mandatory updates)
Unified release notes architecture across platforms
Added changelog generation to web amplify prebuild
Vendor tun2socks v2.6.0 as internal package
iOS TUN buffer pool with blocking read implementation
Enforce Single Source of Truth for tunnel selection in dashboard
Refactor to use unique TUN IPs and exact matching for conflict detection
Remove conflicting TUN IPs from third-party VPNs before setup
Add golangci-lint configuration and goroutine patterns documentation
Comprehensive test coverage: 200+ new tests across Go backend, React components, and E2E

versions.content:
## New Features
- DNS address masquerading for DNS hijacking
- Renewal reminder cron job
- Retailer CRM functionality
- Kanban task management

## Bug Fixes
- Minor stability improvements
- Windows display issues (CORS and viewport scaling)
- Desktop window size flashing on Windows startup
- iOS KaituCore.xcframework linking in Capacitor plugin
- Duplicate cron task prevention

## Improvements
- Log path configuration simplified
- Desktop window hidden startup with tray-ready trigger
- DNS robustness improvements and log noise reduction
- Dashboard and tunnels page redesigned for login-first experience
- Client architecture simplified with window._k2 injection

versions.content:
## New Features
- Sentry error monitoring with device UDID association
- Adapter type detection utilities for Windows

## Bug Fixes
- Minor stability improvements
- Windows wintun orphan adapters with static GUID
- WMI/COM memory leak on Windows
- DNS propagation timing before cache flush
- VPN adapter waiting moved outside route mutex
- Windows gateway watcher mutex lock

## Improvements
- Ping replaced with status heartbeat and speedtest polling
- Windows platform API consolidated into single network.go
- VPN lock strategy simplified with TryLock

Adapter type detection utilities for Windows

Windows wintun orphan adapters with static GUID
WMI/COM memory leak on Windows
DNS propagation timing before cache flush
VPN adapter waiting moved outside route mutex
Windows gateway watcher mutex lock

Windows platform API consolidated into single network.go
VPN lock strategy simplified with TryLock

versions.content:
## New Features
- User hard delete functionality for admin
- HTTP POST /action/{action} endpoint for sync calls
- Desktop app shown in Dock and taskbar
- Viewport scaling for HiDPI displays

## Bug Fixes
- Windows NSIS uninstaller signing
- Desktop window sizing on HiDPI displays
- VPN stops on all exit methods (Dock, Cmd+Q)

## Improvements
- DNS handling simplified (TUN layer intercepts all port 53 traffic)
- VPN route configuration optimized (interface routes instead of gateway routes)
- macOS DNS handling extremely simplified
- Project documentation and build system refactored
- Tauri 2 window/tray/i18n system implemented
- Layered reconnection strategy implemented

HTTP POST /action/{action} endpoint for sync calls
Desktop app shown in Dock and taskbar
Viewport scaling for HiDPI displays

Desktop window sizing on HiDPI displays
VPN stops on all exit methods (Dock, Cmd+Q)

macOS DNS handling extremely simplified
Project documentation and build system refactored
Tauri 2 window/tray/i18n system implemented
Layered reconnection strategy implemented

versions.content:
## New Features
- MPTCP (Multipath TCP) enhanced connection and DNS handling
- Comprehensive E2E test suite for multipath
- Windows E2E test suite and cross-platform testing
- OpenWRT router integration with LuCI iframe
- Responsive layout system for OpenWRT router mode
- K2S legacy protocol backward compatibility
- Local proxy testing environment with QoS simulation

## Bug Fixes
- Windows default gateway restoration after VPN disconnect
- DNS resolver configuration on macOS
- S3 region and ACL configuration for deployment
- Cross-platform binaries preserved during desktop builds
- TLS-only SNI router handling

## Improvements
- Protocol standardized to k2wss with backward compatibility
- K2Config simplified to use single active_tunnel
- Node offline marking functionality added
- Protocol naming conventions standardized
- Build scripts integrated with S3 upload

Windows E2E test suite and cross-platform testing
OpenWRT router integration with LuCI iframe

K2S legacy protocol backward compatibility
Local proxy testing environment with QoS simulation
